label: Household ID
description: Unique household identifier used to merge files.

label: Food insecure (adult category)
description: 1 if adult food security category indicates low or very low food security; else 0.

label: Adult food security category
description: Adult food security category (4-level). Lower numbers indicate higher food security.

label: Food sufficiency indicator
description: Household-reported food sufficiency measure.
notes: 1 often corresponds to food sufficient; other values indicate insufficiency

label: Poverty ratio (cleaned)
description: Household percent of poverty guideline divided by 100; clipped at 10 for extreme values.
notes: Example: 1.0 means at the poverty guideline; 2.0 means 200% of poverty

label: Income band from poverty ratio
description: Income band derived from poverty_ratio for easier reporting.

label: SNAP participation indicator
description: 1 if household indicates SNAP participation across SNAP questions in the access file; else 0.

label: Food pantry use indicator
description: Indicator related to whether household used a food pantry (as coded in the household file).

label: Household size
description: Number of individuals listed in the household roster.

label: Number of adults
description: Count of household members age 18+.

label: Number of children
description: Count of household members age under 18.

label: Number of elderly
description: Count of household members age 65+.

label: Employed adults (count)
description: Count of adults whose employment status equals code '1' in EMPLOYMENT.

label: Any employed adult
description: 1 if at least one adult has employment code '1'; else 0.

label: Household head age
description: Age of the roster member with RELATION_R code '0' (reference person).
notes: From individual roster; may have missing values

label: Household head sex
description: Sex of reference person (RELATION_R='0').

label: Household head Hispanic indicator
description: Hispanic indicator for reference person (RELATION_R='0').

label: Household head race category
description: Race category for reference person (RELATION_R='0').

label: Household head education category
description: Education category for reference person (RELATION_R='0').
notes: Higher values generally indicate more education; see codebook

label: Household head employment code
description: Employment code for reference person (RELATION_R='0').
notes: Code 1 is treated as employed for derived fields

label: Census region
description: Region of residence.

label: Rural indicator
description: Rural indicator as coded in household file.

label: Non-metro indicator
description: Non-metro indicator as coded in household file.

label: Any vehicle
description: Indicator whether household has any vehicle.

label: Number of vehicles
description: Number of vehicles available to the household.

label: Car access measure
description: Car access measure as coded in household file.

label: Distance to supermarket
description: Distance measure to nearest supermarket (units as defined in FoodAPS access file).

label: Distance to convenience store
description: Distance measure to nearest convenience store (units as defined in FoodAPS access file).

label: Distance to Walmart
description: Distance measure to nearest Walmart (units as defined in FoodAPS access file).

label: Distance to nearest SNAP-authorized store
description: Distance to nearest SNAP-authorized retailer (units as defined in FoodAPS access file).

label: Distance to nearest fast-food outlet
description: Distance to nearest fast-food outlet (units as defined in FoodAPS access file).

label: Distance to nearest non-fast-food restaurant
description: Distance to nearest non-fast-food restaurant (units as defined in FoodAPS access file).

label: Food-at-home acquisition events
description: Count of food-at-home acquisition events recorded during diary period.

label: Unique FAH store types used
description: Number of unique store categories used for food-at-home acquisitions.
notes: Based on placecateg_ers in FAH event file

label: Food-away-from-home events
description: Count of food-away-from-home acquisition events recorded during diary period.

label: School meal events (count)
description: Count of events flagged as school meals.
notes: Sum of schoolmeal_flag in FAFH event file

label: Sampling target group
description: FoodAPS sampling target group indicator.

label: Household survey weight
description: Household survey weight for nationally representative estimates.
notes: Optional for competition; not required for most analyses
